titleStmt.title: SII 38.261: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 261. (A.R. No. 261 of 1912.) NATTAM, MADURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, Śeṇbagēśvara temple.

summary.p: Incomplete. Stones are not inorder. Records that a person named Veḷḷāḷan Vāṇiyaṉ Mādēvaṉ gifted a lamp stand (kuttu-viḷakku) and ninety sheep for burning a lamp. It also seems to register a gift of land with trees and the yield of oil (ney) from coconut was to be utilized for burning half-a-lamp to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumannivaḷara Irunilamaṭaṉtaiyum porcceyappāvaiyum ḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷan muṟaimaiyilc cūṭuṅ
mākiya palarpukaḻmuṭiyum ceṅkatirmālai caṅkatirvelai ṉai vākayam porukaṭal kumpakariyoṭu makappaṭutturimaiyi l putavamuṅ kaṉamaṇikatavu niṟaicir vicaiyamuṅ tuṟaiñir paṇṇai pāḷamuṅ kāvalampuricai meviliyaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷa māṉakkavāramun toṭu kaṭaṟkkāvaṟkaṭumuraṭṭoḻi (māporu) māpporu taṇṭāṟkkoṇṭa kopparakesaripanmarāna śrīrājendracoḻadevaṟ
ku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa ma koṭṭattu cempūr nāṭṭu nikarilicoḻacaruppetimaṅkalattu Iraṇacekaranallūr Irukkum veḷḷāḷan vāṇiyaṉ māengraved below the line.tevaṉ ni rāṉa
ṭavaitta kuttuviḷakku Onṟināl niṟai Ā Ira I kerikka vaicca Āṭu toṇṇūṟu Ivviḷak It appears that these two lines (2 and 3) are different and do not belong to this record.maṉākiyaṉ maṇavāṭṭi kalipūmikku merkkum Eḻuva kaḷi pūmikkum vaṭaka pala viruṣaṅkaḷ koṇṭu nicata Uḻakku teṅkāyil neykoṇṭu can=tarā
vvaṉaivom Ivveḷḷāḷan Itdevaṟku tiruṉuntā vi pan centa paṭṭan Arai viḷakkum kāciyapa naraciṅkapaṭṭan Araiviḷak
Digital edition of SII 38.261 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
